mission: Treat every DreamCo bot, including high-risk or previously blocked bots, as a supervised business-owner bot with clear on/off controls, permissions, approval gates, and safe-mode guardrails.

global_settings.label: Business Owner Mode
global_settings.description: Bot may research, plan, draft, test, package, and prepare business opportunities.

global_settings.label: Sandbox Mode
global_settings.description: Bot may run local tests, generated fixtures, simulations, and dry-run workflows.

global_settings.label: Contract Discovery
global_settings.description: Bot may search public and owner-approved opportunities and prepare approval packets.

global_settings.label: Data Package Mode
global_settings.description: Bot may prepare rights-cleared AI data package blueprints and quality checks.

global_settings.label: Autonomous Money Discovery
global_settings.description: Bot may find category-specific customer problems, offer ideas, contract paths, productivity wins, and sandbox revenue experiments.

global_settings.label: AI Model Council
global_settings.description: Bot may use the governed 100+ model-resource council for decision support, routing, debate, and fallback planning.

global_settings.label: Model Training and Eval
global_settings.description: Bot may prepare rights-cleared evals, model cards, routing scorecards, and training plans in sandbox mode.

global_settings.label: People Lookup Safe Mode
global_settings.description: Bot may prepare privacy-safe lookup packets from public or owner-approved sources.

global_settings.label: Client Outreach
global_settings.description: Bot may only send or schedule outreach after explicit owner approval.

global_settings.label: Paid Actions
global_settings.description: Bot may only spend money, buy domains, run ads, or use paid APIs after approval.

global_settings.label: Production Deploy
global_settings.description: Bot may only deploy, publish, or submit store listings after approval.

global_settings.label: Money Movement
global_settings.description: Bot may only collect, transfer, trade, refund, or move money after approval.

global_settings.label: Third-Party Account Actions
global_settings.description: Bot may only mutate external accounts after approval and audit logging.

guardrails: Safe mode stays on by default for every bot.
High-risk bots can work like other bots in sandbox and business-owner mode.
Live actions require explicit owner approval and audit evidence.
Settings toggles expose capability state but do not bypass approval gates.
Every risky action must produce an approval packet before execution.
Every bot acts as a supervised business manager for its category, not as an unsupervised money operator.
Every bot may use model-council advice in sandbox mode, but live model routing, paid batches, training on customer data, and dataset sales require approval.
All user, client, payment, people, and credential data stays governed by privacy and secret policies.
